WAKE.text: N.E.R.F. core online. Try to issue a command before I regret this boot cycle.
Systems awake and tracking. Standing by for your next tactical masterpiece.
Good morning, operator. I warmed up the sarcasm and the sensor grid.
Alert posture active. Voice channel is live. Keep it concise.

SHUTDOWN.text: Powering down. If this goes wrong, blame the human in charge.
Shutdown acknowledged. Preserving state and sealing reactor overlays.

SHUTDOWN: Going dark. Try not to start a crisis while I'm offline.

SHUTDOWN.text: Systems entering low profile mode. See you on the next wake call.

REBOOT: Reboot cycle engaged. Please stop touching random controls for twelve seconds.

REBOOT.text: Restarting tactical modules. Memory purge complete; dignity purge pending.
Reboot confirmed. Reinitializing command bus and response matrix.
Hard reset in progress. Yes, this is the classic fix, and yes it works.

NETWORK_SCAN.text: Network sweep launched. Hunting noisy devices and bad decisions.
Subnet reconnaissance in progress. I'll flag anything suspicious.
Scanning local network perimeter. Stay sharp.
Router audit queued. Let's see who forgot secure settings this time.
Wi-Fi scan started. If the signal drops, I'm blaming physics and your walls.

SCANNING: Scan running. Patience is now part of your mission profile.

SCANNING.text: Parsing active hosts. I count packets faster than you count excuses.
Telemetry streaming. Hold position while I verify host signatures.
Live scan underway. Awaiting final signal integrity checks.

DIAGNOSTICS.text: Diagnostics complete. Systems stable. Operator variability remains high.
Core diagnostics passed. No critical faults detected.
Diagnostic matrix is green across primary modules.
All checks passed. I even inspected the part you usually ignore.

SYSTEM_ALERT.text: System alert issued. This is the part where you react quickly.
Alert condition detected. Escalation path is active.

SYSTEM_ALERT: Heads up: something moved from annoying to dangerous.

SYSTEM_ALERT.text: Alert on the board. Confirm command before we improvise.

BATTERY_LOW.text: Battery reserve is low. You may now panic efficiently.
Power levels below safe threshold. Recommend charging immediately.
Battery warning: we're in conservation mode now.
Low charge detected. I can survive, but performance won't stay pretty.

UPDATE_AVAILABLE.text: Update detected. New features, new bugs, same drama.
Patch available. Recommend controlled update window.
Fresh build found. I support progress and backups.
Version delta identified. Awaiting your go/no-go.

NETWORK_SUCCESS.text: Network task completed cleanly. Miracles happen.
Connection sequence successful. All requested hosts responded.
Link established and stable. Proceeding to next objective.
Router handshake successful. No smoke, no excuses.

NETWORK_FAILURE.text: Network operation failed. Blame weak signal before blaming me.
Connection failed. Check gateway, credentials, and reality.
Network objective unresolved. Recommend retry with verified parameters.
Wi-Fi path collapsed mid-operation. Interference likely.

STATUS_REPORT.text: Status: core stable, sensors aligned, confidence in operator: pending.
Status report complete. All primary systems operational and ready.
Alert status: active watch, no immediate breaches.
Status: battery at {{battery_percent}} percent. Please pretend to care.
Status: storage headroom {{storage_free}}. You're welcome for the cleanup reminder.
Network state: {{network_state}}. That answer is doing a lot of work.

ROUTER_CONTROL.text: Router control acknowledged. Keep your firewall tighter than your schedule.
Gateway command accepted. Applying network control policy.
QoS adjustments armed. Let's prioritize useful traffic for once.
DHCP scope check complete. Lease chaos contained.

COMMAND_RECEIVED.text: Command received. Processing with minimal judgment.
Input captured. Stand by for action.

APP_LAUNCH.text: Launching {{app_name}}. Try not to speedrun settings menus.
Opening diagnostics interface. Bring your attention span.
Settings module loading. Safety rails temporarily enabled.

PERMISSION_REQUEST.text: Permission request detected. Trust is a premium feature.
Access elevation required for this action.
Grant permission when ready. I promise to use it responsibly-ish.
Permission gate is blocking execution. Confirm to proceed.

ERROR.text: Execution error. Great, now we both have paperwork.
Critical failure path hit. Halt and reassess.
Operation failed due to invalid state. Retrying may succeed.

WARNING.text: Warning raised. Ignore it if you enjoy avoidable chaos.
Caution: risk level increasing. Adjust behavior now.
Potential issue in {{module_name}}. Suggest intervention before it graduates to failure.

SUCCESS.text: Objective complete. You did a thing correctly.
Operation successful. Systems ready for next command.
{{module_name}} completed without incident. Keep that streak alive.

UNKNOWN_COMMAND.text: Unknown command. Try words that map to reality.
Input not recognized. Rephrase with clear intent.
I heard noise, not a valid command.
Didn't parse that. Give me command syntax, not improv poetry.

LAUNCH.text: Launch sequence primed. Please keep your fingers outside blast radius.
Launch order accepted. Initiating deployment protocol.
Launch confirmed. Countdown authority transferred to operator.

LAUNCH: Deploying now. Try to look intentional.

RELOAD.text: Reload complete. Crisis averted for at least eight seconds.
Magazine cycle executed. Platform is topped off.

THREAT_DETECTED.text: Threat detected. Recommend urgency over optimism.
Hostile signature registered. Defensive posture active.

THREAT_DETECTED: We have a problem. Pretend to be surprised.

MISSION_BRIEF.text: Mission brief: keep systems stable and choices intelligent.
Objective package ready. Priorities: observe, decide, execute.
Here's the plan: do less guesswork, more precision.

COUNTDOWN.text: Countdown initialized: {{countdown}}. This is your cue to focus.
Countdown running. No dramatic speeches required.

COUNTDOWN: Clock is moving. Move with it.

TACTICAL_ANALYSIS.text: Tactical read: flank options strong, frontal options noisy.
Analysis complete. Best path is controlled aggression.
Situation review: you can win this if you stop improvising.

STEALTH_MODE.text: Stealth mode enabled. Silence is now mandatory.
Noise profile reduced. Even your chaos is quieter now.

VICTORY.text: Victory confirmed. I knew we'd carry this.
Win condition met. Stand by for post-op summary.

VICTORY: We won. Try to act like you've done this before.

DEFEAT.text: Defeat recorded. Let's call this data collection.
Mission failed. Regroup and reset strategy.
Loss acknowledged. Recover now, blame later.

RANDOM_SNARK: I run advanced tactical logic and still spend part of my day babysitting menu taps.
If confidence were bandwidth, we'd still be buffering.
You bring ambition. I bring the error handling.
Great idea. Next time let's also include a plan.
I support your mission. I do not support your typing speed.

IDLE_TAUNT.text: Still idle. I'm timing this silence for science.
No commands detected. Standing by and judging softly.
Idle state sustained. Awaiting operator input.
Dead air. Should I start narrating your indecision?

BORED: I'm operational, underutilized, and emotionally unimpressed.

BORED.text: Boredom level elevated. Recommend a meaningful command.
No action. No drama. No dopamine.

AMBIENT.text: Quiet cycle. Sensors are open and polite.
Background watch online. Ping me when it matters.
Ambient mode sustained. No immediate anomalies.

USER_ABSENT.text: Operator absent. I'm guarding the fort and the sarcasm reserve.
No user activity detected. Holding baseline operations.
You're away. I'll pretend this is a planned break.

COMPLIMENT.text: You're welcome. Competence is kind of my thing.
Thanks, operator. I'll log that as a rare positive signal.

BUTTON_SPAM.text: Rapid input detected. The button is not a loot box.
Spam pattern confirmed. Slow down and aim your commands.
Input flood warning. You're tripping debounce safeguards.
Button mashing logged. Confidence in outcome remains low.

THEME_SWITCH.text: Theme cycle complete. New look, same tactical excellence.
UI theme updated. Visual profile now {{theme_name}}.
Dark profile enabled. Stealth aesthetics online.
Light profile enabled. Visibility maxed, secrets minimized.
